info.description: This is the API documentation for Easy DEVS.
info.title: Easy DEVS API

post.description: Sends a prompt to OpenAI to generate a diagram in JSON format based on a strict schema.

parameters.description: Data required to generate a diagram
parameters.name: body

post.description: Analyzes a DEVS model and generates description, keywords, and role using AI.

parameters.description: Model ID to generate documentation for
parameters.name: body

post.description: Generates an Experimental Frame (EF) structure around a target model for validation scenarios.

parameters.description: Data required to generate EF structure
parameters.name: body

post.description: Sends a prompt to OpenAI to generate a DEVS model code in Python or Go.

parameters.description: Data required to generate a model
parameters.name: body

post.description: Logs in a user with the provided identity (email or username) and password.
Logs out a user by invalidating the refresh token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's information based on the access token.

post.description: Refreshes the access token using a valid refresh token.
Registers a new user with the provided username, email, and password.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all diagrams
Retrieve a single diagram by its ID

delete.description: Delete a diagram by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing diagram with partial data

post.description: Create an experimental frame association (target model -> coupled frame model)

get.description: Retrieve all experimental frames linked to a target model
Retrieve a single experimental frame by its ID

delete.description: Delete an experimental frame by its ID

get.description: Returns the status of the API to confirm it is running
Returns the list of programming languages available for DEVS models
Returns the atomic model code template for the specified language

parameters.description: Model name to inject in template
parameters.name: name

get.description: Retrieve a list of all libraries
Retrieve a single library by its ID

delete.description: Delete a library by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing library with partial data

get.description: Retrieve a list of all models
Retrieve a single model by its ID

delete.description: Delete a model by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing model with partial data

get.description: Retrieve a single model by its ID
generateSimulationFile generate a zip that will contain all infromations for simulation
Retrieve all simulations for the authenticated user
Retrieve all simulations for a specific model

post.description: Create a new simulation for the specified model (does not start it)

get.description: Retrieve a simulation by its ID
Retrieve all DEVS messages that transited during a simulation (includes simulation status for polling)

post.description: Start an existing simulation (call after WebSocket is connected)

get.description: Retrieve a list of all user
Retrieve a single user by their ID

delete.description: Delete an existing user by their ID

patch.description: Update an existing user with partial data

get.description: Retrieve a list of all workspace

post.description: Create a new workspace and store it in the database

get.description: Retrieve a single workspace by its ID

delete.description: Delete an existing workspace by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing workspace with partial data

userPrompt.example: Generate a model based on the previous code
